error_signature: The value 'some value' is not supported
title: Zoho CRM node stage name input issue
symptom: When trying to select a stage name in the Zoho CRM node, the error 'The value 'some value' is not supported' appears.
applies_when: Attempting to select or input a stage name
root_cause: The Zoho CRM node may not be displaying the available options for stage names due to a bug or misconfiguration. This can occur if the input type is not set correctly or if there are issues with the node's integration with Zoho.
fix_steps: Change the input type to an expression in the Zoho CRM node
Manually type the stage name exactly as it appears in Zoho
Save the workflow and test the node again
agent_instruction: Set the input type to expression and enter the exact stage name from Zoho.
